SEARCH
Package app.service.impl.anomalies

Class QuantumDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService

java.lang.Object
app.service.impl.anomalies.QuantumAnomaliesDetectionService<DataRecord>
app.service.impl.anomalies.QuantumDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService
All Implemented Interfaces:
AnomaliesDetectionService<DataRecord>
public class QuantumDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService extends QuantumAnomaliesDetectionService<DataRecord>
Concrete implementation of the QuantumAnomaliesDetectionService specialized for processing raw sequential pricing data evaluated as DataRecord structures.

It configures a 5-qubit quantum simulation state to evaluate Open, High, Low, Close, and Volume.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class app.service.impl.anomalies.QuantumAnomaliesDetectionService

    FEATURE_NAMES, ORIGINAL_FEATURE_COUNT, QUANTUM_STATE_SIZE, QUBITS

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    QuantumDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService()
    Instantiates the quantum anomaly service and statically configures the required feature map structures mapping the 5 primitive OHLCV dimensions.

  • Method Details

    • parseData

      protected double[][] parseData(List<DataRecord> data)
      Transforms a generic collection list of financial domain records into a primitive 2D matrix structure.

      Extracts the sequential OHLCV values array from the source collection models.

      Specified by:
      parseData in class QuantumAnomaliesDetectionService<DataRecord>
      Parameters:
      data - The working List containing generic time-series instances.
      Returns:
      A primitive 2D double matrix tracking dimensional mapped values.
